title: ctc_loss backward triggers double free corruption

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Call ctc_loss with targets containing an out-of-range class index, then run backward.
expected: PyTorch should raise a clear framework-level exception for invalid CTC targets.
observed: The process aborts with double free or corruption.
